rulesStrings.li: ntkmeme_scene->The image [depicts] [Quantity_adjphrase] Mirira pulling on a retiring Qiluo. The Mirira look desperate and reluctant to let go. At the bottom are two lines: "What will we eat without you?" "Yeah, what?" [style_clause].

ntkmeme_scene->This work [depicts] a surgical accident. On the operating table lies [ntkmeme_surgery_victim], [side_position] is a dragonian doctor saying: "I didn't kill you, the rimworld killed you!"

ntkmeme_scene->The work [depicts] a doctor crying beside a [ntkmeme_race] corpse.[side_position] is a [PersonJob] [desc_pawn], comforting: "A healer's skill grows with every patient treated. In other words, the more patients you kill, the more skilled you become."
ntkmeme_scene->The image [depicts] a pair of smiling tigers and two black-horned sharks. [style_clause], [symbolizes] something [AdjectiveFriendly] about New Three Kingdoms.

ntkmeme_scene->The story takes place at [ntkmeme_place] in [ntkmeme_location]. A [pawn_adj] [ntkmeme_race] is giving a speech to [Quantity_adjphrase] soldiers: "All forces, hear me! Fight to the last moment, then return to heaven by your own blade!"
ntkmeme_scene->The entire image [depicts] a [emotional_expression] dragonian, [idles] at [ntkmeme_location]. [style_clause], with the caption: "Dragon, is a symbol of king!"

ntkmeme_scene->The scene [depicts] a [ConceptBadass] [Enemy] at [ntkmeme_place] in [ntkmeme_location], turning to say: "Wait here, watch me stab [ntkmeme_specialCharacter] ten thousand see-through holes!"

ntkmeme_scene->In the scene, a [ntkmeme_race] angrily pounds the table, with [ntkmeme_emotional_expression_strong] on their face, shouting: "[ntkmeme_specialCharacter] is nothing but a brute! Where did they get the nerve to sneak-attack my [community]?" [style_clause].

ntkmeme_scene->The image [depicts] a desk. [side_position], a [PersonJob] is reporting, while a [ntkmeme_race] behind the desk reveals a [ntkmeme_emotional_expression_peace] expression, saying: "That explains it, that explains it."

ntkmeme_scene->The scene appears to take place in [ntkmeme_location]. [Quantity_adjphrase] [ntkmeme_race] are [ntkmeme_dialogue]: "The women you like are nothing like what [NamePerson] likes. [NamePerson] prefers married young women, especially someone else's wife."

ntkmeme_scene->In the scene, two armies face off. On one side is [ntkmeme_specialCharacter], while [side_position], a [ntkmeme_race] is issuing a challenge: "Speak my name and you shall tremble! I am [NamePerson], Supreme General of [community]!" [style_clause].
ntkmeme_scene->This work [depicts] a [strong_emotional_expression] [ntkmeme_specialCharacter]. [side_position] are the words: "Impossible, absolutely impossible!" [style_clause]

ntkmeme_scene->The image [depicts] a [strong_emotional_expression] [ntkmeme_race], [ConceptAngsty] shouting: "Even if it were eighty thousand steamed buns, [ntkmeme_specialCharacter] would need half a month to finish them! How could they just be thrown away!"

ntkmeme_scene->In the image, [ntkmeme_specialCharacter] orders: "[NamePerson] insulted me — twenty strokes of the cane!" [side_position], the one being caned looks [AdjectiveAny], crying out while being beaten: "Fool of a leader! Fool, fool, fool of a leader! You are a fool of a leader!" This appears to take place in [ntkmeme_location].

ntkmeme_scene->The work [depicts] a [ntkmeme_race] with a [ntkmeme_emotional_expression_strong] expression, with the caption: "I submitted a petition to [ntkmeme_specialCharacter] requesting to be appointed [ntkmeme_officialPosition], and it was denied! They must have seen my [community] growing stronger and deliberately rejected my request!"
ntkmeme_scene->The work [depicts] two [ColorBadass] swords, [style_clause]. The words "Sword of Benevolence" and "Sword of Righteousness" are inscribed on each sword, displaying [ConceptPositive].
ntkmeme_scene->In the image, two [ntkmeme_race] stand back to back. One [desc_pawn] and speaks: "In this [community], who is the real master — you or me?" [style_clause]

ntkmeme_scene->The work tells a story at [ntkmeme_place] in [ntkmeme_location]: [ntkmeme_specialCharacter] [desc_pawn], while [side_position], their subordinate is urging them. The other shows no concern, saying: "I've fought battles all my life — can't I enjoy myself a little? Keep the music playing, keep the dancing going!"

ntkmeme_scene->In the image, a [ntkmeme_race] with an [emotional_expression_peace] expression is drinking with another [ntkmeme_race]. The latter [desc_pawn] and says: "I won't be polite — someone, bring me a bigger cup!" [style_clause].

ntkmeme_scene->The story [depicts] in this work takes place in [ntkmeme_location]. A [ntkmeme_race] is [ntkmeme_dialogue] with their subordinate. The former [emotional_expression], and speaks with [ConceptBadass]: "Alright then, if they cross the river, I'll cross the river too!" [style_clause].
ntkmeme_surgery_victim->a [ntkmeme_race] whose [ntkmeme_organ] was taken out and put back halfway
ntkmeme_surgery_victim->a [ntkmeme_race] with head separated from body
